content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom index 7, which is labeled as O:7 (oxygen). Looking at the molecular structure, I can see the bonds connected to this oxygen atom.

Atom O:7 is covalently connected to:
- C:6 (carbon atom with index 6)
- H:42 (hydrogen atom with index 42)

I can confirm these connections by observing the bonds in the structure. The oxygen atom (O:7) forms two bonds: one with carbon atom C:6 and one with hydrogen atom H:42.

Regarding the geomconf_index for this molecule, based on the file name "geomconf_3304.xyz" in the working directory, the geomconf_index is 3304.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 7 (O) are:
- Atom index 6, element C
- Atom index 42, element H

Geomconf_index: 3304

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
